ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the mission started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the mission ended or is expected to end */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  "lead_scientist" TEXT /* Name of the lead scientist for the mission */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission (e.g., active, completed, planned) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the mission */,
  "total_data_collected" INTEGER /* Total number of data records collected by the mission */,
  "last_data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data collection by the mission */,
  "mission_objectives" TEXT /* Detailed objectives of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rovers" (
  "rover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rover or lander */,
  "rover_name" TEXT /* Name of the rover or lander */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the rover is part of */,
  "manufactured_by" TEXT /* Company that manufactured the rover */,
  "deployed_date" TEXT /* Date the rover was deployed on Mars */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the rover (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "rover_type" TEXT /* Type of rover (e.g., rover, lander) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the rover on Mars */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last successful contact with the rover */,
  "total_data_sent" INTEGER /* Total number of data records sent by the rover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rovers_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rovers_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "rover_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rover or lander that collected the data */,
  "terrestrial_date" TEXT /* Date on Earth when the data was collected */,
  "sol" INTEGER /* Martian solar day (sol) when the data was collected */,
  "ls" INTEGER /* Ls (solar longitude) value at the time of data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Martian month when the data was collected */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction recorded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rovers_data_rover_id FOREIGN KEY ("rover_id") REFERENCES rovers ("rover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_types_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Celsius, Pascal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., Celsius to Kelvin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type in the file */,
  "data_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement in the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_unit_id") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rovers_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rovers_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scientist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rovers_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the alert is related to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature anomaly, pressure drop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES rovers_data ("data_id")
)
